charters.title: Oral Supplementation for Cognitive Enhancement
charters.objective: Design a personalized, evidence-based oral supplementation protocol targeting cognitive performance — memory, focus, processing speed, neuroprotection, and long-term brain health.
charters.successCriteria: - [ ] Literature review of top-tier nootropic compounds completed

decisions.text: Scope expanded to include off-label pharma + injectables + novel pathways

risks.mitigation: Full interaction check before starting; consult physician
Only recommend third-party tested brands (NSF/USP)
Use objective metrics where possible; blind self-testing
Tier system forces prioritization; start with Tier A only

risks.risk: Overcomplicated protocol leads to poor adherence
risks.mitigation: Keep daily stack ≤8 supplements; simple AM/PM split

risks.mitigation: 14-day rolling average; don't use for primary decisions

charters.title: Molluscum Contagiosum Treatment
charters.objective: Fully resolve molluscum contagiosum infection with combination of in-office cryotherapy and at-home imiquimod. Track treatment progress and clearance timeline.

outstanding.text: Cryotherapy (liquid nitrogen) applied to visible lesions
**Imiquimod 5% cream (Aldara)** — apply 3x/week at bedtime to any lesions. Wash off after 6-10 hours. Continue for up to 16 weeks or until cleared.
Return visit in 3-4 weeks for reassessment
Treat any new lesions that appear (normal — incubation period of existing subclinical lesions)
Consider Gardasil 9 vaccine (separate from molluscum — general HPV protection, via PCP)
Avoid shaving over or near active lesions (prevents autoinoculation)
Use separate towels for affected area
Avoid sexual contact with active visible lesions present

risks.mitigation: Imiquimod catches subclinical lesions
Reduce frequency if needed; mild redness = working
Additional cryo sessions at follow-up
Immune system typically prevents reinfection
